sources.our_model: v2 (ESPN BPI base + injury + momentum + travel + coach + variance, 50K sims)
sources.barttorvik: T-Rank 10K sims (from search: Duke 20.2%, Michigan 17.9%, Arizona 14.8%, Florida 9.1%, Houston 7%)

key_disagreements.note: BIGGEST DISAGREEMENT. ESPN BPI gives Louisville 81% but does NOT account for Brown Jr being OUT (18.2 PPG). Our model adjusts for this = massive edge.
ESPN BPI (90.1%) and market (92.1%) DO NOT reflect Holloway arrest (16.8 PPG, off team). Our model: 59.7% Alabama. Spread moved from -23.5 to -11.5 but still overvalues Bama.
ESPN BPI (81.9%) way too high for a team without All-American Toppin (21.8/10.8) on a 3-game skid. Our model: basically a coin flip at 51.9%.
ESPN BPI gives UNC 61.6% despite Wilson being OUT. Our model flips this to VCU 69%. Torvik data confirms UNC drops from 16.6 to 7.6 differential without Wilson.
ESPN BPI (72.2%) doesn't weight UCLA injuries (star forward + Dent calf) + 2700-mile travel to Philly heavily enough. Our model flips to UCF.
Near coin flip in all models. BPI only gives SMC 53.2%. Market at 60.5% overvalues the 7-seed. A&M's veteran squad + 35.6 bench ppg = value.
BPI calls this 50.9/49.1 (basically even). Market slight lean to Georgia. Our model gives Saint Louis 59.3% due to elite offense (86.4 ppg, 59.7% eFG) vs Georgia's 302nd-ranked scoring defense.

highest_confidence_upsets.why: Louisville missing 18.2 PPG lottery pick. USF 10-0 L10, +19.6 margin, AAC champs.
highest_confidence_upsets.note: ESPN BPI doesn't reflect Brown Jr OUT. Our model is the edge.

highest_confidence_upsets.why: UNC without Caleb Wilson (top-5 pick). Torvik confirms 16.6→7.6 differential drop. VCU 9-1 L10.
highest_confidence_upsets.note: Torvik data SUPPORTS this upset. BPI partially reflects it (only 61.6% UNC).

highest_confidence_upsets.why: UCLA star injured + Dent limited + 2,700-mile travel. UCF is healthy and rested.
highest_confidence_upsets.note: Only our model flips this. BPI and market still favor UCLA.

highest_confidence_upsets.why: Tech without All-American Toppin (21.8/10.8), 3-game losing streak. Akron won 19 of 20.
highest_confidence_upsets.note: Our model sees coin flip. BPI (81.9%) and market (74.1%) still heavily favor Tech.

highest_confidence_upsets.why: Veteran squad, 35.6 bench ppg. BPI only gives SMC 53.2% (near even).
highest_confidence_upsets.note: BPI agrees this is very close. CBS model also picked this upset.

highest_confidence_upsets.why: Elite offense (86.4ppg, 59.7% eFG) vs 302nd-ranked scoring defense.
highest_confidence_upsets.note: BPI agrees this is basically even (50.9% Georgia). CBS model also picked this.
